name: Datadog Observability
description: Dashboards, monitors, logs, metrics, incidents, SLOs, APM traces via Datadog's official MCP

env_vars.how_to_set: app.datadoghq.com → Organization Settings → API Keys → New Key

env_vars.description: Datadog Application Key for API authorization
env_vars.how_to_set: app.datadoghq.com → Organization Settings → Application Keys → New Key

tools.name: list_dashboards
tools.description: List all Datadog dashboards with title, description, author, layout type, and modification timestamps

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Retrieve a specific dashboard by ID with all widgets, template variables, and layout configuration

dashboard_id.description: The ID of the dashboard to retrieve

tools.name: search_logs
tools.description: Search and filter log entries by query, time range, and facets with aggregation support

from.description: Start time as ISO 8601 timestamp or relative (e.g. 'now-1h')

to.description: End time as ISO 8601 timestamp or relative (e.g. 'now')

limit.description: Maximum number of log entries to return (default 50, max 1000)

tools.name: list_monitors
tools.description: List all Datadog monitors with name, type, status, query, and alert conditions

tags.description: Comma-separated list of tags to filter by

tools.name: query_metrics
tools.description: Query Datadog metric timeseries data with aggregation, grouping, and formulas

from.description: Start time as UNIX epoch seconds

to.description: End time as UNIX epoch seconds
